---
title: "GLEAM differential analysis guide"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GLEAM differential analysis guide}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(GLEAM)
data("pbmc_medium_matrix", package = "GLEAM")
data("pbmc_medium_meta", package = "GLEAM")
sc <- score_signature(
  expr = pbmc_medium_matrix,
  meta = pbmc_medium_meta,
  geneset = "immune_small",
  geneset_source = "builtin",
  species = "human",
  seurat = FALSE,
  method = "rank",
  min_genes = 3,
  verbose = FALSE
)
```

## Comparison levels

`test_signature()` supports multiple levels:

- `cell` (exploratory)
- `sample`
- `celltype`
- `sample_celltype`
- `pseudobulk`
- `region`
- `sample_region`
- `trajectory`

## Common patterns

```{r, eval=FALSE}
res_cell <- test_signature(sc, group = "group", level = "cell", method = "wilcox")
res_sample <- test_signature(sc, group = "group", sample = "sample", level = "sample", method = "wilcox")
res_celltype <- test_signature(sc, celltype = "celltype", group = "group", level = "celltype", method = "wilcox")
res_sample_celltype <- test_signature(sc, group = "group", sample = "sample", celltype = "celltype", level = "sample_celltype")
res_pb <- test_signature(sc, group = "group", sample = "sample", celltype = "celltype", level = "pseudobulk")

res_wct <- test_signature(
  score = sc,
  group = "group",
  sample = "sample",
  celltype = "celltype",
  target_celltype = "CD8_T",
  level = "sample"
)
```

## Differential result visualizations

```{r, eval=FALSE}
plot_volcano(res_pb)
plot_celltype_compare(res_celltype)
plot_group_in_celltype(res_wct)
```
